ddls:
CREATE TABLE "process_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the process being measured */,
  "measurement_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the measurement */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time at which the measurement was taken (in seconds) */,
  "add_value" REAL /* Value added to the process */,
  "multiply_value" REAL /* Value multiplied in the process */,
  "subtract_value" REAL /* Value subtracted from the process */,
  "divide_value" REAL /* Value divided in the process */,
  "power_value" REAL /* Power value used in the process */,
  "pid_value" REAL /* Process ID (PID) value at the time of the measurement */,
  "measurement_status" TEXT /* Status of the measurement (e.g., Normal, Warning, Alarm) */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to any alerts generated from the measurement */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that took the measurement */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_measurements_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_measurements_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_measurements_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the process */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the process (e.g., Running, Stopped, Paused) */,
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production line where the process is running */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator responsible for the process */,
  "process_type" TEXT /* Type of process (e.g., Assembly, Machining) */,
  "process_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processes_production_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("production_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processes_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the process the profile is associated with */,
  "profile_name" TEXT /* Name of the profile */,
  "add_limit" REAL /* Limit for the add value */,
  "multiply_limit" REAL /* Limit for the multiply value */,
  "subtract_limit" REAL /* Limit for the subtract value */,
  "divide_limit" REAL /* Limit for the divide value */,
  "power_limit" REAL /* Limit for the power value */,
  "pid_limit" REAL /* Limit for the PID value */,
  "profile_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the profile */,
  "profile_version" TEXT /* Version of the profile */,
  "profile_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the profile */,
  "profile_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_profiles_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, operator, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for quick contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement that generated the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., Warning, Alarm) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES process_measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production line */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the production line */,
  "line_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the production line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., Temperature, Pressure) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "sensor_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)
